channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-06-01
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: Isabel Schnabel: From money market funds to stablecoins: lessons for central banks
item.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (ecb - press / speeches / interviews) ; impact marché.

item.title: Charente-Maritime. L'Assurance maladie a subi près de quatre millions d'euros de fraude en 2025 - lhebdo17.fr
item.description: Charente-Maritime. L'Assurance maladie a subi près de quatre millions d'euros de fraude en 2025 lhebdo17.fr — Thématique assurance ; source jugée fiable (google news - dora / lcb-ft / conformité fr) ; impact risques/cyber.

item.title: Press release - Highlights of this week's international trade committee
item.description: Extraordinary meeting of the International Trade Committee and joint meeting with the Internal Market Committee and the Industry Committee. Both on Tuesday 2 June Committee on International Trade Source : © European Union, 2026 - EP — Thématique géopolitique ; source jugée fiable (european parliament - press releases) ; impact marché.

item.title: Incendie de Crans-Montana : "transactions opaques", soupçons de fraude à l'assurance... Un compte bancaire "secret" ravive les soupçons financiers autour du couple Moretti - L'Indépendant
item.description: Incendie de Crans-Montana : "transactions opaques", soupçons de fraude à l'assurance...
